name: AntiDIF
description: Generate diverse antibody sequences from 3D backbone structure using discrete diffusion.
capabilities: Generate diverse antibody sequences from 3D backbone structure using discrete diffusion

pdbFile.description: Antibody 3D backbone structure in PDB format

heavyChainId.description: Chain ID of the heavy chain

lightChainId.description: Chain ID of the light chain

numSequences.description: Number of diverse sequences to generate via discrete diffusion
